"""Improved dual backbone model for predict.py"""
import torch
import torch.nn as nn
from transformers import AutoModel
import timm

class ImprovedDualClassifier(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_classes=10):
        super().__init__()
        self.dino = AutoModel.from_pretrained('facebook/dinov2-base')
        self.clip = timm.create_model('vit_base_patch16_clip_224.openai', pretrained=True, num_classes=0)
        
        for param in self.dino.parameters():
            param.requires_grad = False
        for param in self.clip.parameters():
            param.requires_grad = False
        
        dino_dim = self.dino.config.hidden_size
        clip_dim = self.clip.num_features
        total_dim = dino_dim + clip_dim
        
        self.head = nn.Sequential(
            nn.LayerNorm(total_dim),
            nn.Dropout(0.5),
            nn.Linear(total_dim, 512),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(512),
            nn.Dropout(0.4),
            nn.Linear(512, 256),
            nn.GELU(),
            nn.LayerNorm(256),
            nn.Dropout(0.3),
            nn.Linear(256, num_classes)
        )
    
    def forward(self, x):
        with torch.no_grad():
            dino_feat = self.dino(x).last_hidden_state[:, 0]
            clip_feat = self.clip(x)
        features = torch.cat([dino_feat, clip_feat], dim=1)
        return self.head(features)
